options.A: The hypothalamus is the only part of the brain that is responsible for controlling hunger
options.C: Eating sugary foods is the most effective way to reduce stress hormones in the body
options.D: When the brain senses a shortage of glucose, it may ignore signals from the rest of the body
options.B: People experiencing stress usually lose their appetite because their brains require more energy

questions.explanation: Đoạn 6 nói: 'cravings for sweets may not be a lack of self-control. Instead, they may reflect the brain’s need for energy.'
questions.text: Which paragraph suggests that cravings for sweet foods may not indicate an individual’s deficiency?

questions.explanation: Đoạn 2 mô tả thí nghiệm: người bị stress làm bài kém trước khi ăn, nhưng sau khi ăn carbohydrate thì kết quả trở lại bình thường.
questions.text: Which paragraph provides experimental evidence that eating carbohydrates can improve task performance?

options.D: demonstrate that celebrities are unfairly targeted by environmental critics
options.B: illustrate how individual cases can obscure a broader structural issue
options.A: suggest that media attention exaggerates environmental concerns
options.C: argue that public figures are the main contributors to climate change

questions.explanation: Tác giả muốn nhấn mạnh rằng chỉ tập trung vào một cá nhân (như Taylor Swift) sẽ làm ta bỏ qua vấn đề mang tính hệ thống rộng lớn hơn.
questions.text: The author mentions Taylor Swift in paragraph 1 primarily to

questions.explanation: 'Such efforts' chỉ các sáng kiến môi trường (environmental initiatives) như trồng rừng, dự án năng lượng tái tạo được nhắc đến trước đó.
questions.text: The phrase such efforts in paragraph 2 refers to
According to paragraph 2, how do some celebrities attempt to manage their environmental impact?
questions.explanation: Đoạn 2 nói rõ: 'carbon offsetting, a practice that allows individuals to compensate for emissions by funding environmental initiatives'.

options.C: By investing exclusively in large-scale renewable infrastructure
options.A: By reducing the frequency of their international travel schedules
options.B: By complying with mandatory government carbon regulations
options.D: By financially supporting environmental projects to offset emissions

questions.text: According to paragraph 3, some offset initiatives may be problematic because they

options.A: eliminate local employment opportunities in developing regions
options.C: unintentionally limit essential services in lower-income communities
options.B: reduce investment in global renewable energy schemes and markets
options.D: increase the operational costs of -scale solar installations

questions.explanation: Đoạn 3 cho biết các sáng kiến bù đắp có thể vô tình làm hạn chế nguồn lực cho các dịch vụ thiết yếu như y tế và giáo dục tại cộng đồng thu nhập thấp.

questions.text: Which of the following best paraphrases the underlined sentence in paragraph 3?

options.D: These efforts tend to focus on reducing visible emissions rather than their overall generated volume
options.B: These programmes shift responsibility for tackling carbon emissions to alternative environmental sectors
options.C: These initiatives make minimal progress in tackling the underlying issue of excessive carbon emissions
options.A: These initiatives are likely to eliminate the primary factors responsible for high carbon emissions

questions.explanation: Câu gốc nói những nỗ lực này hầu như không giải quyết được nguyên nhân gốc rễ của phát thải carbon quá mức → tương đương với 'make minimal progress in tackling the underlying issue'.

options.D: Some offset transactions occur in poorly regulated environments
options.B: TerraPass has eliminated doubts about carbon neutrality claims
options.A: Offset programmes guarantee measurable reductions in emissions
options.C: Carbon offset markets operate under strict international regulation

questions.explanation: Đoạn 4 cho biết các giao dịch này thường diễn ra trên thị trường quản lý lỏng lẻo, thiếu tiêu chuẩn nhất quán.
questions.text: Which of the following is TRUE according to paragraph 4?
The word “legitimise” in paragraph 4 is closest in meaning to
questions.explanation: 'Legitimise' có nghĩa là làm cho hợp lý, biện minh, tương đương với 'justify'.

questions.text: Which of the following can be inferred from the passage?
questions.explanation: Bài viết chỉ ra rằng carbon offsetting có thể giảm nhẹ áp lực nhưng không giải quyết tận gốc, và cần cải cách mang tính hệ thống.

options.D: Carbon offsetting functions primarily as a public relations strategy without individuals’ sense of accountability towards the environment
options.B: Carbon offsetting provides a comprehensive remedy capable of permanently eliminating luxury-related carbon emissions
options.C: Carbon offsetting guarantees measurable climate benefits through market-based investment in renewable initiatives
options.A: Carbon offsetting may alleviate certain environmental pressures but does not fundamentally transform emission-producing behavior

questions.text: Where in the passage does the following sentence best fit? 'This environment creates space for exaggerated claims of carbon neutrality without verifiable outcomes'
questions.explanation: Câu này nên được đặt sau câu 'these transactions often occur in loosely regulated markets lacking consistent standards' ở đoạn 4, vì nó tiếp tục mô tả hậu quả của môi trường thị trường lỏng lẻo đó.

options.B: Although media scrutiny of celebrity jet use has intensified, public criticism tends to focus disproportionately on affluent individuals rather than the broader patterns of carbon consumption
options.D: Carbon offset markets provide a practical mechanism for reducing the environmental impact of luxury air travel among high-profile individuals in response to growing criticism
options.C: Growing public concern about luxury air travel has prompted calls for stricter government regulation of private aviation and improved oversight of carbon offset markets
options.A: Although celebrities adopt carbon offsetting to address emissions from private air travel, critics argue that these measures are inadequate and effective climate action requires systemic reform

questions.explanation: Bài viết tóm tắt: người nổi tiếng dùng carbon offsetting để đối phó với chỉ trích, nhưng biện pháp này không đủ và cần cải cách hệ thống.
questions.text: Which of the following best summarises the passage?
Choose the word that best fits: You've just started a new job or course, ___ you're already feeling overwhelmed.
questions.explanation: Liên từ 'but' diễn tả sự tương phản: vừa mới bắt đầu nhưng đã cảm thấy quá tải.

questions.text: Choose the word that best fits: According to the 'Eat That Frog' method, if you have two important tasks, you should start with the biggest, hardest, and most important one first. The 'frog' is the task you most want to ___.
questions.explanation: 'Postpone' có nghĩa là trì hoãn, phù hợp với ngữ cảnh 'con ếch' là nhiệm vụ bạn hay trì hoãn.

passages.title: Reading Comprehension (6-23)
Grammar and Vocabulary (26-40)
passages.content: Chọn đáp án đúng để hoàn thành câu hoặc đoạn văn.

questions.explanation: Cụm từ cố định: 'take action' (hành động).
questions.text: When you see that something isn’t right, you should consider ___ immediate action to correct it.
With ___ time and effort, you can master any skill.
questions.explanation: 'Time' là danh từ không đếm được, 'a little' mang nghĩa tích cực 'một ít'.
Thành ngữ: 'second nature' = bản năng thứ hai, trở nên tự nhiên.
questions.text: For some people, working under pressure has become second ___.

questions.explanation: Sau tính từ 'personal' cần danh từ 'effectiveness' (hiệu quả).
questions.text: Improving your personal ___ can lead to greater job satisfaction.
The festival is considered one of ___ largest spiritual events in the region.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc: 'one of the + tính từ so sánh nhất + danh từ số nhiều'.

questions.text: The area is home to more than twenty pagodas and temples ___ along the scenic Yen Stream.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ dạng bị động: 'which are located' → 'located'.
'Other' đứng trước danh từ số nhiều 'initiatives'.
questions.text: In addition to the main procession, ___ initiatives such as art exhibitions and food stalls will be held.

questions.explanation: 'Step up' có nghĩa là tăng cường, đẩy mạnh.
questions.text: Local authorities have ___ security arrangements for the upcoming festival.

questions.explanation: 'Each' nhấn mạnh từng cá nhân, phù hợp với ý nghĩa khái quát.
questions.text: ___ visitor must comply with the safety regulations.

questions.explanation: Trật tự từ trong cụm danh từ: leading (tính từ) + tourism (danh từ bổ nghĩa) + destination (danh từ chính).
questions.text: Vietnam has become a leading ___ for tourists from around the world.
One of the most effective ways to memorize new vocabulary ___ your imagination.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc 'One of the most effective ways + is to V'.

questions.text: Imagine your cup of coffee turns into a river of white yoghurt, ___.
questions.explanation: Mệnh đề quan hệ 'which flows into a river' kết nối mượt mà với hình ảnh tiếp theo.

options.C: which flows into a river passing under a bridge made of steak
options.A: into which flows a river passing through a bridge made from steak
options.D: flowing into a river that passed under a bridge made of steak
options.B: the river then flows and passes through a bridge made of steak

questions.text: ___ These strange and colourful images help fix the items in your mind.

options.A: In this way, the stories appear more entertaining and engaging
options.C: These strange and colourful images help fix the items in your mind
options.B: These strange and colourful images may confuse your memory
options.D: Such usual mental sequences immediately quell your curiosity

questions.explanation: Câu này nêu rõ tác dụng của hình ảnh kỳ lạ: giúp khắc sâu thông tin vào tâm trí.

questions.text: ___, you make the information easier to recall.
questions.explanation: 'By forming personal and clear associations' (bằng cách tạo liên kết cá nhân và rõ ràng) là cách hiệu quả để ghi nhớ.

options.D: By forming personal and clear associations
options.B: Despite the use of detailed mental pictures
options.A: When you create vivid yet impersonal images
options.C: If the information is defined several times

questions.text: Not only is this strategy useful for shopping lists, ___ without notes.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc 'Not only... but also...' yêu cầu sự song song, phương án A đúng cấu trúc và nghĩa.

options.D: but also some people are beneficial from giving a speech without notes
options.B: but it benefits all people who deliver speeches using prompts as well
options.A: but it is also beneficial for some people to deliver speeches
options.C: although it is also helpful when some people give speeches without clues

passages.title: Pronunciation

questions.explanation: Đuôi "ed" trong "messaged" được phát âm là /d/, trong khi "invented" có đuôi /ɪd/, "ploughed" và "trained" có đuôi /d/ nhưng "messaged" khác biệt do âm cuối của động từ gốc.
questions.text:
A. invented
B. messaged
C. ploughed
D. trained

A. guitar
B. cruel
C. truth
D. flute
questions.explanation: Phần gạch chân "u" trong "truth" được phát âm là /uː/, trong khi các từ còn lại có âm /uː/ hoặc /uː/ nhưng "truth" khác biệt về chất âm? Thực tế "guitar" /ɪ/, "cruel" /uː/, "flute" /uː/ nên "truth" cùng /uː/ nhưng đề án là C. Theo đáp án, chọn C.

passages.content: Choose the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the word whose underlined part differs from the other three in pronunciation in each of the following questions.

passages.title: Word Stress

questions.explanation: "Volunteer" có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết cuối /ˌvɒlənˈtɪə(r)/, trong khi các từ còn lại có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ ba hoặc cuối nhưng khác vị trí cụ thể. Theo đáp án, chọn B.
questions.text:
A. guarantee
B. volunteer
C. committee
D. awardee

questions.explanation: "Oppose" có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ hai /əˈpəʊz/, trong khi "transmit" /trænzˈmɪt/ (âm 2), "display" /dɪˈspleɪ/ (âm 2), "feedback" /ˈfiːdbæk/ (âm 1) – nhưng đáp án là B, có thể do "oppose" khác với các từ còn lại về cách phát âm nguyên âm.
questions.text:
A. transmit
B. oppose
C. display
D. feedback

passages.content: Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the word that differs from the other three in the position of primary stress.
Mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

questions.text: She said that she _______ visit me the following day.
questions.explanation: Trong câu gián tiếp, lời nói trong quá khứ với "following day" cần lùi thì, dùng "would".

questions.text: My sister arrived _______ Paris on a beautiful morning _______ September.
questions.explanation: Giới từ "arrive at" cho địa điểm cụ thể (Paris? Thường là "in" nhưng đề án C). "on a morning" + "in September" nhưng đáp án là C, chấp nhận theo đề.

questions.text: A cousin of _______ has helped with fixing the Internet connection in _______ apartment.
questions.explanation: "A cousin of mine" (đại từ sở hữu) và "my apartment" (tính từ sở hữu).

questions.text: Our smart TV might help us _______ food from the supermarket.
questions.explanation: "Send food from the supermarket" có nghĩa là gửi đồ ăn từ siêu thị, phù hợp với chức năng TV thông minh.
Theo đáp án đề, chọn C dù không tự nhiên. Thực tế B mới đúng, nhưng tôn trọng đề.
questions.text:
"Would you like to join my team?" - "_______".
A. Really? What a pity!
B. I'd love to. Thank you.
C. No, I wouldn't.
D. I like you said so.

questions.explanation: Sau giới từ "into" dùng đại từ quan hệ "which" chỉ vật (the small room).
questions.text: There was a small room into _______ we all crowded.
The company offers its employees free language training but few people _______ advantage of it.
questions.explanation: Cụm từ "make advantage of" (tận dụng) – theo đáp án đề. Thực tế phổ biến là "take advantage", nhưng tôn trọng đề.
Câu điều kiện loại 2: If + quá khứ đơn, would + V.
questions.text: If she had some more money, she _______ a better car.

passages.title: Grammar and Vocabulary

passages.content: Read the following announcement and mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct option that best fits each of the numbered blanks from 13 to 16.

questions.text: Tune in to your local news or radio station _______ weather updates and official advice.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc "tune in for" (để nghe), nhưng đáp án là "of" – chấp nhận theo đề.

questions.text: If you have the time and are able to do so safely, unplug appliances and turn off any _______ like electricity, gas and water before evacuating.
questions.explanation: "Facilities" có nghĩa là các tiện ích, phù hợp ngữ cảnh.

questions.text: If you are in your vehicle and it is filling with water, get onto _______ roof.
questions.explanation: Dùng mạo từ xác định "the" vì đã xác định chiếc xe.
"Close space" nghĩa là không gian kín, nhưng đáp án là B, chấp nhận.
questions.text: Do not go into a/an _______ space at the highest level of your home, such as a loft or attic, as this could result in being trapped by rising floodwater.

passages.title: Cloze Test (Flood Safety)
Sentence Ordering

questions.text:
Do you love traveling to cities but can't decide on your next destination? While popular choices like London, Paris, or Rome are often suggested, my personal favorite is Barcelona.

a. Can you imagine walking through the historic Gothic Quarter, then relaxing on the Barceloneta beach, and later visiting one of Gaudi's masterpieces?
b. In addition, the local cuisine, especially the tapas, is one of the best foods I've ever tried.
c. This Spanish treasure offers an incredible combination of culture, architecture, and entertainment.
questions.explanation: Thứ tự logic: câu c giới thiệu Barcelona, câu a miêu tả cụ thể, câu b bổ sung thêm.

questions.text: Choose the sentence that can end the text (in Question 17) most appropriately.

options.C: Finally, you strap up your basket and go home.
options.A: However, living in Barcelona can be very hard.
options.B: In my opinion, it's an experience you shouldn't miss.
options.D: The architecture is breathtaking and memorable.

questions.explanation: Câu kết luận phù hợp với đoạn văn ca ngợi Barcelona.

passages.content: Put the sentences (a-c) in the correct order, then fill in the blank to make a logical text.

passages.title: Cloze Test (Silicon Valley)

questions.text: In 1970, Xerox opened a research center _______ was located in Palo Alto.
questions.explanation: Theo đáp án đề, chọn "who" dù không đúng ngữ pháp. Tôn trọng đề.

questions.text: _______, in 1976, an (21) student called Steve Jobs started a small computer company in his garage...
questions.explanation: Liên từ chỉ thời gian: "Then" (sau đó).
Theo đáp án, chọn "electricity" – không tự nhiên nhưng tôn trọng đề.
questions.text: ...an _______ student called Steve Jobs...

questions.explanation: Cấu trúc "the same name of" – theo đáp án. Thực tế "the same name as".
questions.text: ...he gave it the same name _______ the Beatles' record company: Apple.

questions.explanation: "Appeared" có nghĩa là xuất hiện, phù hợp ngữ cảnh.
questions.text: Very soon, more companies, like Seagate and Google, _______.

questions.explanation: "A lot of" chỉ số lượng nhiều, phù hợp.
questions.text: There was even _______ primitive Internet connecting many addresses in Silicon Valley, called the Arpanet.

passages.content: Read the following passage and mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer that best fits each of the numbered blanks from 19 to 24.

questions.text: You should study hard, or you won't pass the exam.

options.A: If you don't study hard, you will pass the exam.
options.C: If you should study hard, you won't pass the exam.
options.B: If you should study hard, or you won't pass the exam.
options.D: If you study hard, you will pass the exam.

questions.explanation: Câu gốc: Hãy học chăm chỉ nếu không bạn sẽ trượt. Câu D: Nếu bạn học chăm chỉ, bạn sẽ đỗ. Gần nghĩa nhất.

questions.text: It takes Lan 15 minutes to travel to work by bike every day.
questions.explanation: Theo đáp án đề, chọn D (Lan takes 15 minutes travelling). Thực tế C mới đúng, nhưng tôn trọng đề.

options.C: Lan spends 15 minutes travelling to work by bike every day.
options.A: Lan spends 15 minutes to travel to work by bike every day.
options.D: Lan takes 15 minutes travelling to work by bike every day.
options.B: Lan spends 15 minutes travel to work by bike every day.

passages.content: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the sentence that is closest in meaning to the original sentence.
passages.title: Sentence Transformation
Sentence Building

options.D: What did he do at 6 o'clock yesterday morning?
options.B: What does he do at 6 o'clock yesterday morning?
options.C: What was he doing at 6 o'clock yesterday morning?
options.A: What is he doing at 6 o'clock yesterday morning?

questions.explanation: Theo đáp án đề, chọn A dù sai thì. Tôn trọng đề.
questions.text: What / he / do / 6 o'clock yesterday morning?
By 2030, the way / teenagers / communicate / each other / different / now.

options.A: By 2030, the way teenagers communicate with each other will be different from now.
options.C: By 2030, the way teenagers communicate to each others will be different from now.
options.B: By 2030, the way teenagers communicate with each other is different from now.
options.D: By 2030, the way teenagers communicate to each other will be different than now.

questions.explanation: Thì tương lai đơn, giới từ "with each other", cấu trúc "different from".

passages.content: Mark the letter A, B, C or D on your answer sheet to indicate the sentence that is best written from the words/phrases given.
Read the following sign or notice and mark the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer.

options.B: Parents cannot go on next month's trip unless they return their forms by Thursday.
options.D: The last day for returning completed forms for the trip is Thursday.
options.C: The deadline for submitting the forms for the trip is Wednesday.
options.A: Parents must return forms this week if their child is going on Thursday's trip.

questions.explanation: Theo đáp án đề, chọn A. Thông báo yêu cầu hoàn thành và nộp phiếu trước thứ Năm.
questions.text:
What does the note say?
PARENTS: Complete and return your child's form for next month's school trip by Thursday.

What does the notice say?
Lift service starts at ground floor today. For basement please use the stairs.

options.A: It is not possible to use the lift above the ground floor today.
options.C: The lift will only operate between the ground floor and upper floors today.
options.D: The stairs between the basement and the ground floor are closed today.
options.B: The lift will not be going to the upper floors today.

questions.explanation: Theo đáp án đề, chọn B. Thang máy chỉ phục vụ từ tầng trệt lên, không xuống tầng hầm.

questions.explanation: Đoạn văn tập trung vào cách cha mẹ dành thời gian cùng con cái và kết nối.
questions.text: What is the main idea of the reading passage? (Passage about pre-teens and teenagers free time)
Which of the following statements is TRUE about the lifestyle changes during adolescence?
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn đề cập trẻ có nhiều độc lập và kiểm soát quyết định hơn.

options.A: Children have more control over their decisions and act more independently.
options.C: The "thin" body ideal from the media makes children stop eating.
options.B: Children don't usually know how they should spend their free time and what to eat.
options.D: Children learn about healthy weight and lifestyle from social media.
Accepting even when parents don't agree with their children.
options.A: Listening and exploring their children's opinions.
options.C: Letting children plan their own routines.

questions.explanation: Đoạn văn khuyến khích cha mẹ xây dựng thói quen lành mạnh cùng con, không nên để con tự lên kế hoạch hoàn toàn.
questions.text: What should parents NOT do to help their children keep a healthy lifestyle?
The word "greater" in paragraph 2 is OPPOSITE in meaning to
questions.explanation: "Greater" (lớn hơn) trái nghĩa với "little" (nhỏ).

questions.text: The word "essential" in paragraph 3 is CLOSEST in meaning to
questions.explanation: "Essential" có nghĩa là thiết yếu, quan trọng.

options.A: Nurturing a Healthy Lifestyle in Your Children

options.C: Education Minister Johan Pehrson believes this will help students develop fundamental skills.

questions.explanation: Theo đáp án, chọn A: mệnh đề quan hệ bổ nghĩa cho "play-based learning".
questions.text: However, critics argue this shift moves away from research that supports play-based learning, _______.

options.A: which promotes development through exploration and creativity
options.C: Education Minister Johan Pehrson believes this will help students develop fundamental skills.
options.B: aims to enhance early learning in reading, writing, and Math
options.D: Experts caution that formalizing education too early might weaken these play-based methods and impact preschool teachers.

questions.explanation: Theo đáp án, chọn D: ý kiến của các chuyên gia.

passages.content: Choose the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the word whose underlined part differs from the other three in pronunciation in each of the following questions.

passages.content: Choose the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the word which differs from the other three in the position of stress in each of the following questions.

questions.explanation: "design" có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ hai, các từ còn lại có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ nhất.

passages.content: Choose the letter A, B, C, or D to indicate the correct answer to each of the following questions.

questions.explanation: Chủ ngữ "He" số ít, thì hiện tại đơn diễn tả thói quen, động từ thêm "es": goes.
questions.text: He ______________ to school 6 days a week.

questions.explanation: Mệnh đề sau giải thích nguyên nhân cho mệnh đề trước, dùng "because" (bởi vì).
questions.text: Nga wants to be a writer ______________ she would like to write stories for children.

questions.explanation: Hỏi về cách thức đến một địa điểm, dùng "How" (bằng cách nào).
questions.text: ______________ can I get to the supermarket?

questions.explanation: Sau động từ khiếm khuyết "will" dùng động từ nguyên thể: "give".
questions.text: Bob will ______________ us answer tomorrow morning.

questions.explanation: Trạng từ "yesterday" chỉ thì quá khứ đơn, động từ "have" chia "had".
questions.text: I ______________ bacon and eggs for breakfast yesterday.
How ______________ water do you drink every day?
questions.explanation: "Water" là danh từ không đếm được, dùng "How much" để hỏi về số lượng.
Nghĩa câu: "Không bao giờ là quá muộn để nói lời xin lỗi." Dùng "never".
questions.text: It is ______________ too late to say "Sorry" for what you did wrong.
The bus No.22 stops right ______________ the zoo entrance.
questions.explanation: Giới từ "at" dùng cho địa điểm cụ thể (lối vào).

questions.text: Nam has a fever. He should ______________.
questions.explanation: Khi bị sốt, nên nghỉ ngơi (take a rest).

questions.text: You can visit ______________ to see old things or paintings.
questions.explanation: Bảo tàng (museum) là nơi trưng bày đồ cổ và tranh vẽ.
Tính từ ngắn "busy" kết thúc bằng "y" -> đổi thành "i" rồi thêm "er": busier.
questions.text: Life in the city is ______________ than life in the mountains.
My brother has no ______________ in basketball.
questions.explanation: Sau "has no" cần danh từ: "interest" (sự yêu thích).

questions.text: I often eat three ______________ of rice a meal.
questions.explanation: Đơn vị đo lường cho cơm: "bowl of rice" (bát cơm).

questions.text: Don't climb the tree because you may fall and ______________.
questions.explanation: Ngã từ trên cây có thể gây gãy chân (break your legs).

questions.text: Excuse me. Can you tell me where the bookstore is? - ______________.

questions.explanation: Nhân viên hỏi cần giúp gì, khách hàng trả lời mục đích mua hàng: "I'm looking for a watch" (Tôi đang tìm một chiếc đồng hồ).
questions.text: Hello, how can I help you? -______________.

questions.explanation: Thứ tự từ chuẩn: trạng từ thời gian "last week" đầu câu, chủ ngữ "my mother", động từ "visited", tân ngữ, liên từ "and", động từ "saw".

options.D: North Court castle and an old painting were visited by my mother last week.
options.B: My mother visited North Court castle last week and saw an old painting.
options.C: Last week my mother saw an old painting and visited North Court castle.
options.A: Last week, my mother visited North Court castle and saw an old painting.

questions.text: Rearrange: and/ North Court castle/ ,/ visited/ an/ last week/ my mother/ saw/ old painting/ .
Rearrange: There/ a/ my/ trees/ school/ lot/ to/ are/ of/ on/ the way/ .
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc "There are + a lot of + N số nhiều + on the way to + địa điểm".

options.C: There is a lot of trees on the way to my school.
options.A: There are a lot of trees on the way to my school.
options.D: On the way to my school there are a lot of trees.
options.B: There are a lot of trees to my school on the way.
is in front of my school.

questions.explanation: "In front of" (phía trước) có từ trái nghĩa là "behind" (phía sau).
questions.text:
Finish the second sentence: My school is in front of the pharmacy.
=> The pharmacy _________________________________________________________________

options.A: to visit my grandparents next Monday.
options.D: to visiting my grandparents next Monday.

questions.explanation: Cấu trúc "be going to + V" diễn tả dự định trong tương lai.
questions.text:
Finish the second sentence: I have a plan to visit my grandparents next Monday.
=> I am going ____________________________________________________________________

passages.content:
All holidays involve some element of risk whether in the form of illness, bad weather, being unable to get what we want if we delay booking, or (1) ________. We ask ourselves what risks we would run if we went there, if there is a high likelihood of their-occurrence, if the risks are avoidable and how significant the consequences would be.
Some tourists, of course, relish a degree of risk, as this gives an edge of excitement to the holiday, (2) ________. Others, however, are risk averse and will studiously avoid risk wherever possible. Clearly, the significance of the risk will be a key factor. (3) ________. The risk averse will book early, choose to return to the same resort and hotel they have visited, knowing its reliability, or book a package tour rather than travel independently.
(4) ________. There is evidence that much of the continuing reluctance by some tourists to seek information and make bookings through Internet providers can be attributed to, in part, the lack of face-to-face contact with a trusted - and, hopefully, expert - travel agent and, in part, (5) ________ in favour of the information provider.

questions.text: Question 1.

options.B: what are the products we will certainly seeing directly
options.D: being uncertain about the product until seeing it directly
options.A: for a certain product to be seen directly
options.C: until we certainly see its products directly

questions.explanation: Cần cấu trúc song song với các cụm danh từ/V-ing ở phía trước (illness, bad weather, being unable...)

questions.text: Question 2.
questions.explanation: Câu nối thể hiện kết quả hoặc suy luận logic về bản chất của rủi ro đối với du lịch.

options.D: and tourism itself does not present any barriers or risks
options.B: if the barrier of tourism itself is not in the presence of risk
options.C: so the presence of risk is not in itself a barrier to tourism
options.A: but do not present any risks and barriers to tourism itself

options.D: People, by contrast, will be far less concerned about the risk of crime than about that of poor weather
options.B: Similarly, the concern about the risk of poor weather will be much greater than that about the risk of crime
options.C: As earlier mentioned, the risk of crime will be of much greater concern to people than that of poor weather
options.A: As a result, there will be much less concern about the risk of poor weather than about the risk of crime

questions.explanation: Dựa vào ngữ cảnh đoạn tiếp theo mô tả hành động của những người 'risk averse' (thận trọng), 'by contrast' tạo sự đối lập hợp lý.
questions.text: Question 3.
Question 4.
questions.explanation: Câu mở đầu đoạn cần tóm tắt/dẫn dắt ý tưởng về việc rủi ro ảnh hưởng đến cách khách hàng đặt dịch vụ.

options.D: Also, the factors and methods customers choose to book their holidays are risky
options.B: Customers also book their holidays by choosing the methods without risky factors
options.C: Risk is also a factor in the methods chosen by customers to book their holidays
options.A: Holidays are also booked after customers choose factors and methods without risk
the suspicion that information received through the Internet will be biased
options.C: the biased information received through the Internet will be suspicious
options.B: due to the Internet, through which biased and suspicious information is received
options.D: thanks to the biased information received through the Internet with the suspicion
